name: The Dark Side of the Moon
description: A landmark progressive rock album exploring themes of time, money, and mental health through seamless sonic storytelling.

name: Wish You Were Here
description: A reflective album built around absence and tribute, especially honoring former member Syd Barrett.

name: Arnold Layne
description: A quirky debut single about a peculiar character with unusual habits that set early Pink Floyd apart.

name: Brothers in Arms
description: A polished rock album blending emotional storytelling with cutting-edge 80s production.

name: Sultans of Swing
description: A breakout track showcasing intricate guitar work and observational lyrics about bar-band musicians.

name: Love at First Sting
description: A hard rock album that helped define the band’s global arena-rock sound in the 80s.

name: Rock You Like a Hurricane
description: A high-energy rock anthem built for stadiums and heavy rotation.

name: Machine Head
description: A defining hard rock album famously featuring one of the most iconic riffs in rock history.

name: Smoke on the Water
description: A legendary riff-driven song inspired by a real-life recording studio fire.

name: Rising
description: A powerful blend of hard rock and early metal showcasing virtuosic musicianship.

name: Stargazer
description: An epic, dramatic track built like a fantasy saga in guitar form.

name: Eye in the Sky
description: A sleek, atmospheric album blending progressive rock with pop sensibilities.

name: The Turn of a Friendly Card
description: A concept album exploring gambling, fate, and chance through layered progressive arrangements.
